items.caption: A collage of three stills from a television show featuring three women in a living room setting. the woman on the left is holding a pregnancy test, which the woman in the middle humorously misidentifies as a perfume sample. the woman on the right, who is wearing a green robe, is playfully suggesting that the woman on the left should put the test behind her ears to make it look like a perfume sample. the background shows a cozy living room with a couch and a plant. the text overlay includes quotes from the show, indicating a comedic exchange between the characters.
